# MDLMeshBufferType

**Enumeration**

Options for the content of a mesh buffer, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBuffer/type] property and by [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferAllocator] methods for creating buffers.

## Declaration

```swift
enum MDLMeshBufferType
```

## Constants

- **MDLMeshBufferType.vertex**: The buffer contains per-vertex data for one or more vertex attributes of a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMesh] object.
- **MDLMeshBufferType.index**: The buffer contains index data for a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLSubmesh] object.

## Enumeration Cases

- **MDLMeshBufferType.custom**

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
